frame_analyses.description: Task setup showing gauze with printed circular pattern between clamps, double circle marking visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear target circle approximately 4cm diameter with inner and outer guidelines

frame_analyses.description: Right grasper and left scissors positioned, grasper making contact with gauze edge
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Timer starts when instruments touch gauze, proper instrument positioning

frame_analyses.description: Scissors beginning to cut at approximately 5 o'clock position of circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Following tutorial recommendation to start at 5 o'clock, good entry point selection

frame_analyses.description: Cutting progressing clockwise around circle, approximately at 7 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Steady progression, maintaining proximity to marked line

frame_analyses.description: Continuing clockwise cut, now at approximately 9-10 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good tissue handling with grasper providing counter-traction

frame_analyses.description: Cut progressing toward 11-12 o'clock position, approaching completion of clockwise phase
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining consistent distance from marked line throughout

frame_analyses.description: Cut reaching top of circle (12 o'clock), preparing for direction change
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean cut line visible, no obvious deviations from target

frame_analyses.description: Beginning counterclockwise cutting from 12 o'clock back toward 5 o'clock start
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Direction change executed smoothly, continuing precise cutting

frame_analyses.description: Counterclockwise cut progressing, approximately at 2-3 o'clock position
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining accuracy in second cutting phase

frame_analyses.description: Cut approaching 4-5 o'clock, nearing completion of full circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final phase of cutting, preparing to close the circle

frame_analyses.description: Circle cut appears complete, gauze piece becoming free from surrounding material
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completion, circular piece successfully cut out

frame_analyses.description: Cut circular gauze piece fully separated, task completed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean completion with circular piece intact and free

penalties.description: Minor deviation observed at 3 o'clock position, estimated 1mm outside target line
Slight deviation at 10 o'clock position, estimated 1mm inside target line

confidence_rationale: Clear view of cutting technique and timing, but some deviation measurements estimated due to 2D video limitations and angle. Completion time and major technique elements well-observed.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviations at all 8 cardinal points due to camera angle limitations
Whether both plys of gauze were cut (task allows cutting only top ply)
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with smooth cutting technique, proper starting position, and good direction change. Total time of 90 seconds places this in expert range (60-90s benchmark).
strengths: Started at recommended 5 o'clock position per tutorial
Smooth clockwise to counterclockwise direction change
improvement_suggestions: Minor accuracy improvements at 3 and 10 o'clock positions
Could potentially achieve even faster time while maintaining accuracy
